jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
